endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists
endpoints.description: Gets all the Image Lists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists
endpoints.description: Creates an image list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}
endpoints.description: Returns the details of the image list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: PUT /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}
endpoints.description: Updates an image list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}
endpoints.description: Deletes image list with the list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}/RefreshIndex
endpoints.description: Refreshes the index of the list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}/images
endpoints.description: Gets all image Ids from the list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}/images
endpoints.description: Add an image to the list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}/images
endpoints.description: Deletes all images from the list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/imagelists/{listId}/images/{ImageId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an image from the list with list Id and image Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{IMAGEID}} with a real imageid. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists
endpoints.description: gets all the Term Lists
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists
endpoints.description: Creates a Term List
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}
endpoints.description: Returns list Id details of the term list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: PUT /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}
endpoints.description: Updates an Term List.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}
endpoints.description: Deletes term list with the list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}/RefreshIndex
endpoints.description: Refreshes the index of the list with list Id equal to list ID passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}/terms
endpoints.description: Gets all terms from the list with list Id equal to the list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}/terms
endpoints.description: Deletes all terms from the list with list Id equal to the list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}/terms/{term}
endpoints.description: Add a term to the term list with list Id equal to list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid. Replace {{TERM}} with a real term.

endpoints.name: DELETE /contentmoderator/lists/v1.0/termlists/{listId}/terms/{term}
endpoints.description: Deletes a term from the list with list Id equal to the list Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{LISTID}} with a real listid. Replace {{TERM}} with a real term.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/moderate/v1.0/ProcessImage/Evaluate
endpoints.description: Returns probabilities of the image containing racy or adult content.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/moderate/v1.0/ProcessImage/FindFaces
endpoints.description: Returns the list of faces found.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/moderate/v1.0/ProcessImage/Match
endpoints.description:
Fuzzily match an image against one of your custom Image Lists. You can create and manage your custom image lists using this API. Returns ID and tags of matching image.

Note: Refresh Index must be run on the corresponding Image List before additions and removals are reflected in the response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/moderate/v1.0/ProcessImage/OCR
endpoints.description: Returns any text found in the image for the language specified. If no language is specified in input then the detection defaults to English.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/moderate/v1.0/ProcessText/DetectLanguage
endpoints.description: This operation will detect the language of given input content. Returns the ISO 639-3 code for the predominant language comprising the submitted text. Over 110 languages supported.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Detect profanity and match against custom and shared blacklists
endpoints.description: Detects profanity in more than 100 languages and match against custom and shared blacklists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/review/v1.0/teams/{teamName}/jobs
endpoints.description:
A job Id will be returned for the content posted on this endpoint. Once the content is evaluated against the Workflow provided the review will be created or ignored based on the workflow expression.

CallBack Schemas

Job Completion CallBack Sample


{
"JobId": ",
"ReviewId": "",
"WorkFlowId": "default",
"Status": "",
"ContentType": "Image",
"ContentId": "",
"CallBackType": "Job",
"Metadata": {
"adultscore": "0.xxx",
"a": "False",
"racyscore": "0.xxx",
"r": "True"
}
}

Review Completion CallBack Sample


{ "ReviewId": "",
"ModifiedOn": "2016-10-11T22:36:32.9934851Z",
"ModifiedBy": "",
"CallBackType": "Review",
"ContentId": "",
"Metadata": {
"adultscore": "0.xxx", "a": "False",
"racyscore": "0.xxx",
"r": "True"
},
"ReviewerResultTags": {
"a": "False",
"r": "True"
}
}

.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{TEAMNAME}} with a real teamname.

endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/review/v1.0/teams/{teamName}/jobs/{JobId}
endpoints.description: Get the Job Details for a Job Id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{TEAMNAME}} with a real teamname. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/review/v1.0/teams/{teamName}/reviews
endpoints.description:
The reviews created would show up for Reviewers on your team. As Reviewers complete reviewing, results of the Review would be POSTED (i.e. HTTP POST) on the specified CallBackEndpoint.

CallBack Schemas

Review Completion CallBack Sample

{
"ReviewId": "",
"ModifiedOn": "2016-10-11T22:36:32.9934851Z",
"ModifiedBy": "",
"CallBackType": "Review",
"ContentId": "",
"Metadata": {
"adultscore": "0.xxx",
"a": "False",
"racyscore": "0.xxx",
"r": "True"
},
"ReviewerResultTags": {
"a": "False",
"r": "True"
}
}

.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{TEAMNAME}} with a real teamname.

endpoints.name: GET /contentmoderator/review/v1.0/teams/{teamName}/reviews/{reviewId}
endpoints.description: Returns review details for the review Id passed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{TEAMNAME}} with a real teamname.

endpoints.name: POST /contentmoderator/review/v1.0/teams/{teamName}/reviews/{reviewId}/publish
endpoints.description: Publish video review to make it available for review.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{TEAMNAME}} with a real teamname.

endpoints.name: PUT /contentmoderator/review/v1.0/teams/{teamName}/reviews/{reviewId}/transcript
endpoints.description: This API adds a transcript file (text version of all the words spoken in a video) to a video review. The file should be a valid WebVTT format.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{TEAMNAME}} with a real teamname.

endpoints.name: PUT /contentmoderator/review/v1.0/teams/{teamName}/reviews/{reviewId}/transcriptmoderationresult
endpoints.description: This API adds a transcript screen text result file for a video review. Transcript screen text result file is a result of Screen Text API . In order to generate transcript screen text result file , a transcript file has to be screened for profanity using Screen Text API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{TEAMNAME}} with a real teamname.
